title: alysicarpus rugosus var. quartinianus
intro: Alysicarpus rugosus var. quartinianus, also known as Quartin's Alysicarpus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of A. rugosus var. quartinianus include its potential to treat various ailments such as intestinal worms, fever, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, often in combination with other medicinal plants.
